title: stenochlaena buxifolia
intro: Stenochlaena buxifolia, also known as the Australian Water Fern, is a species of fern native to Australia and New Zealand, characterized by its delicate fronds and ability to thrive in moist environments. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Stenochlaena buxifolia include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support the immune system. The plant is typically prepared as a tea or infusion for its herbal benefits, although specific preparation methods may vary depending on the desired outcome.
